items.title: Private Parties
items.description: Perfect for birthdays, engagements, and garden parties. Elevate your celebration and make TM memories..
inclusions: Margaritas mixed with Kombucha & Kefir water
Includes insurances and Occasional license. Application times can vary from council to council. For example Glasgow Council - 7 weeks. East Dunbartonshire - 4 weeks prior to event.
